item.title: Mother Foucault Bookshop Has The Best Bookstore Name Around. And Now They Bought Their Own Building.
item.description: A bookstore buys its forever home, Dr Abbot reads, and the Leonardo DiCaprio Computer Room at the Los Angeles Public Library.

item.title: Book Riot’s Deals of the Day for February 23, 2026
item.description: A mysterious birthmark, a modern day take on Persuasion, a novel in verse set between life and death, and more of today's best book deals.

item.title: Bidding War For Thriller Adaptation!
item.description: Exciting narrator news in true crime, a noir adaptation casting, a throwback post worth reading, and more mystery news and links

item.title: What Romances by Disabled Authors Do Differently
item.description: Romances by disabled romance incorporate important access of everyday life with disabilities in their stories, centering lived experiences and emphasi...

item.title: Read Harder With These New Books Out in March
item.description: These new books out in March also check out 2026 Read Harder Challenge tasks, from books set in space to mysteries in translation!
